title: Trimble Announces New Deployment of Applanix's POS LV to Enable Broader Autonomy Capabilities for IHI Corporation
text: Customizable System Provides Robust Positioning without Added Site Infrastructure SUNNYVALE, Calif. , June 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today the first deployment of its map-based localization system for land-based autonomous vehicle applications.

title: 5 Cathie Wood Stocks to Buy in June
text: Despite the recent selloff, these five Cathie Wood stocks are likely to bounce back thanks to their focus on impressive innovation. The post 5 Cathie Wood Stocks to Buy in June appeared first on InvestorPlace.
